texto: I'm involved in everything from highly progressive lighting systems to airline interiors. In the field of transportation I can go from the micro to the macro: architecture, transportation, industrial product design, right across the board. It's Russian dollism, because they all interrelate: one goes into the other.
explicacao: Citação de Ross Lovegrove sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I'm involved in everything from highly progressive lighting systems to airline interiors. In the …” articula reflexao, design, transportation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como transportation.

texto: Modern design becomes the eye catcher because it's out of context, it is something newborn and fresh, something people have never seen before. I mean, that in itself is the way we should sort of stimulate the senses of society, this urban condition.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ross Lovegrove sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Modern design becomes the eye catcher because it's out of context, it is something newborn and fr…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, society, eye, útil em momentos de eye e people.

texto: I have to think about the future because, not that I'm bored with it now, but I can't live now, it's not my place to live now. I've got to live ahead of myself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ross Lovegrove sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I have to think about the future because, not that I'm bored with it now, but I can't live now, i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, myself, live, útil em momentos de live e think.
